text: The supreme court shall have jurisdiction to enforce the provisions of this article or any orders issued thereunder or to enjoin the enforcement thereof.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 36. State Dept. of Transp.
##### § 1612 — Enforcement

The supreme court shall have jurisdiction to enforce the provisions of this article or any orders issued thereunder or to enjoin the enforcement thereof.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
